title: Wire logos_observability into Sophia startup (closes #334)
description:
Integrate OpenTelemetry into Sophia's FastAPI app using the existing logos_observability shared module.

Working directory: /home/fearsidhe/projects/LOGOS/sophia
Branch: feature/otel-instrumentation

1. Add OTel deps to pyproject.toml [tool.poetry.dependencies]:
  opentelemetry-api = "^1.20.0"
  opentelemetry-sdk = "^1.20.0"
  opentelemetry-instrumentation-fastapi = "^0.41b0"
  opentelemetry-exporter-otlp = "^1.20.0"
Run: poetry lock --no-update

2. Wire setup_telemetry into app lifespan
File: src/sophia/api/app.py
Lifespan at line 234. App created at line 372.

Add imports:
  from logos_observability import setup_telemetry, get_tracer
  from opentelemetry.instrumentation.fastapi import FastAPIInstrumentor
  import os

Inside lifespan(), at top before existing setup:
  otlp_endpoint = os.getenv("OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT")
  setup_telemetry(service_name="sophia", export_to_console=os.getenv("OTEL_CONSOLE_EXPORT", "false").lower() == "true", otlp_endpoint=otlp_endpoint)
  logger.info("OpenTelemetry initialized", extra={"otlp_endpoint": otlp_endpoint or "none"})

After app = FastAPI(...):
  FastAPIInstrumentor.instrument_app(app)

3. Update .env.example — append OTel vars: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT, OTEL_SERVICE_NAME=sophia, OTEL_CONSOLE_EXPORT=false

4. Verify: poetry run pytest tests/integration/test_otel_smoke.py -v && poetry run pytest tests/ -v --timeout=30 -x

Closes: #334

title: Add OTel spans to Sophia API endpoints (closes #335)
description:
Add manual spans with attributes to Sophia's key API endpoints.

Working directory: /home/fearsidhe/projects/LOGOS/sophia
File: src/sophia/api/app.py — all endpoints in this single file.

Use: from logos_observability import get_tracer; tracer = get_tracer("sophia.api")

Endpoints to instrument:
1. POST /plan — span sophia.plan — attrs: plan.goal (str[:200]), plan.request_id
2. POST /simulate — span sophia.simulate — attrs: simulate.plan_id, simulate.horizon
3. GET/POST /state — span sophia.state.read/write — attrs: state.id
4. POST /imagine — span sophia.imagine — attrs: imagine.request_id
5. POST /execute — span sophia.execute — attrs: execute.plan_id, execute.step
6. POST /ingest/hermes_proposal — span sophia.ingest.hermes_proposal — attrs: ingest.proposal_id, ingest.node_count
7. GET /hcg/snapshot — span sophia.hcg.snapshot — attrs: hcg.limit

Pattern: wrap existing body in `with tracer.start_as_current_span(name) as span`, set attributes, record exceptions. Do NOT restructure existing logic.
Do NOT instrument: /health, / (root), static routes.

Verify: poetry run pytest tests/ -v --timeout=30 -x
Closes: #335

title: Sophia OTel tests and documentation (closes #336)
description:
Add span verification tests and OTel docs for Sophia.

Working directory: /home/fearsidhe/projects/LOGOS/sophia

1. Span tests — create tests/unit/api/test_otel_spans.py
Use InMemorySpanExporter fixture to capture and verify spans.
Tests: test_plan_endpoint_creates_span, test_simulate_endpoint_creates_span, test_span_records_exception_on_error, test_ingest_proposal_span_has_node_count
Use FastAPI TestClient. Mock HCG/Neo4j.

2. Documentation — create docs/observability/SOPHIA_OTEL.md
Instrumented endpoints table, env var reference, how to run with OTel collector, example trace viewing. Under 100 lines.

3. Verify existing smoke test: poetry run pytest tests/integration/test_otel_smoke.py -v
Verify all: poetry run pytest tests/ -v --timeout=30

Closes: #336

title: Add OTel spans to Hermes API endpoints (closes #338)
description:
Add manual spans to Hermes's key API endpoints.

Working directory: /home/fearsidhe/projects/LOGOS/hermes
File: src/hermes/main.py — all endpoints in this file.

Use: tracer = get_tracer("hermes.api")

Endpoints:
1. POST /embed_text — span hermes.embed_text — attrs: embedding.model, embedding.text_length, embedding.dimension
2. POST /llm — span hermes.llm — attrs: llm.provider, llm.model, llm.max_tokens, llm.duration_ms
3. POST /simple_nlp — span hermes.nlp — attrs: nlp.operations, nlp.text_length
4. POST /stt — span hermes.stt — attrs: stt.format
5. POST /tts — span hermes.tts — attrs: tts.text_length
6. POST /ingest/media — span hermes.ingest.media — attrs: ingest.content_type
7. POST /feedback — span hermes.feedback — attrs: feedback.type, feedback.correlation_id

Do NOT instrument: /health, /, /ui
Verify: poetry run pytest tests/ -v --timeout=30 -x
Closes: #338

title: Add OTel spans to Apollo API and CLI (closes #341)
description:
Add spans to Apollo's API endpoints and CLI commands.

Working directory: /home/fearsidhe/projects/LOGOS/apollo

API File: src/apollo/api/server.py
tracer = get_tracer("apollo.api")

API endpoints:
1. POST /api/chat/stream — span apollo.api.chat — attrs: chat.prompt_length, chat.provider, chat.model
2. GET /api/hcg/snapshot — span apollo.api.hcg.snapshot — attrs: hcg.limit
3. GET /api/hcg/entities — span apollo.api.hcg.entities — attrs: hcg.count
4. POST /api/persona/entries — span apollo.api.persona.create — attrs: persona.entry_type
5. POST /api/media/upload — span apollo.api.media.upload — attrs: media.content_type

CLI File: src/apollo/cli/main.py
cli_tracer = get_tracer("apollo.cli")
Call setup_telemetry() in CLI group callback before commands run.

CLI commands:
1. plan — span apollo.cli.plan — attrs: plan.goal[:200]
2. execute — span apollo.cli.execute — attrs: execute.plan_id, execute.step
3. chat — span apollo.cli.chat — attrs: chat.prompt_length
4. goal — span apollo.cli.goal — attrs: goal.description_length
5. embed — span apollo.cli.embed — attrs: embed.text_length

Do NOT instrument: /api/hcg/health, WebSocket /ws/diagnostics
Verify: poetry run pytest tests/ -v --timeout=30 -x
Closes: #341

title: Grafana dashboards and E2E verification (closes #344)
description:
Create per-service Grafana dashboards and E2E verification guide.

Working directory: /home/fearsidhe/projects/LOGOS/logos
Branch: feature/otel-instrumentation

Context: One dashboard at infra/dashboards/logos-key-signals.json. Compose at infra/docker-compose.otel.yml (Grafana+Tempo). Provisioning via infra/grafana-dashboards.yaml.

1. Create dashboards in infra/dashboards/:

sophia-traces.json: plan latency (TraceQL service.name=sophia, name=sophia.plan), simulate latency, error rate, recent traces
hermes-traces.json: LLM latency (hermes.llm), embedding latency (hermes.embed_text), NLP latency, error rate, recent traces
apollo-traces.json: chat latency (apollo.api.chat), CLI times (apollo.cli.*), HCG latency, error rate
cross-service.json: cross-service trace latency, service health overview

Each: unique uid, descriptive title, tags [logos, otel, service], refresh 10s, time now-1h.

2. E2E doc — create docs/observability/E2E_TRACE_VERIFICATION.md
Start OTel stack, start services with env vars, generate test traces (curl), verify in Grafana/Jaeger, troubleshooting. Under 150 lines.

3. Validate: dashboard JSON valid, CI workflow picks up new files.

Closes: #344
